title: HEALTH OPPORTUNITY PROSPERITY AND EMPOWERMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: FAITH HOPE AND CHARITY HEALTH OPPORTUNITY PROSPERITY AND EMPOWERMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer support mentoring, certified recovery mentoring, assistance with applications for birth certificates, Social Security, and social services. Can provide basic needs navigation. 460 SW Madison Avenue Suite 1 Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 740-5807 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 740-5807 Administration Main phone (541) 740-5807 Lincoln County Support (541) 961-3268 Will Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Certificates/Forms Assistance Life Skills Education Mentoring Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING NAVIGATION SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH RESOURCE NETWORK If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FAITH HOPE AND CHARITY
